name: Game Skill Effect
description: A player-activated combat skill effect: a clear windup telegraph, a peak impact moment with screen feedback, and a recovery/fade. Conveys cause, hit-stop, and weight. Built for real-time game engines or R3F with frame-budget consciousness.

requiredElements.name: windup-telegraph
requiredElements.description: A short windup (~150-400ms) that telegraphs the skill is coming (charge glow, stance, anticipation).

requiredElements.name: impact-peak
requiredElements.description: A clear peak impact moment at the release/hit with maximum visual intensity (flash, particles, shake).

requiredElements.name: recovery-fade
requiredElements.description: A recovery phase where the effect fades/dissipates; not an instant cutoff.

requiredElements.name: screen-feedback
requiredElements.description: Screen-level feedback at impact (subtle camera shake, flash, or vignette pulse) to sell weight.

requiredElements.name: cooldown-read
requiredElements.description: The skill state is readable (cooldown indicator/charge state) so gameplay reads clearly.

optionalElements.name: hit-stop
optionalElements.description: A brief hit-stop (time scale to ~0 for 40-80ms) at impact to amplify weight.

optionalElements.name: charge-level
optionalElements.description: A charge-level visual that grows with hold duration for charged skills.

optionalElements.name: target-impact-decal
optionalElements.description: A decal/mark at the struck target on hit.

qualityRules.description: Windup provides anticipation; the eye expects the impact.
Impact has weight via timing + screen feedback.
Recovery dissipates naturally, no hard cutoff.
Effect silhouette reads clearly against the scene (contrast, scale).
Effect stays within a frame budget (bounded particles, no per-frame alloc).
Skill state/cooldown is readable to the player.

antiPatterns.description: Instant impact with no windup lacks anticipation and feels weightless.
Hard disappearance with no recovery feels buggy.
Particle counts that scale without a cap spike frame time.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add a brief hit-stop at impact for weight.
Add a charge-level visual for charged skills.

exampleOutputs.label: Skill phase timeline

references.title: The Art of Game Effects animation
references.author: Various game FX artists
